title: Nursing Mission and Vision
content:
Nursing Mission and Vision

Vision

To take a leading part in developing the health of the community at national and international level with the nursing education, research and practice.

Mission

To develop leader nurses capable of giving education, research and practice based on scientific and ethical values in order to protect and develop the health of the community.
